[法] 提审, 移送
evoke.d:
v call forth (emotions, feelings, and responses)
v evoke or provoke to appear or occur
v deduce (a principle) or construe (a meaning)
v summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
v call to mind

evoked.t:
a. [医]诱发的
v. 产生, 引起, 唤起( evoke的过去式和过去分词 )

evokes.t: v. 产生, 引起, 唤起( evoke的第三人称单数 )
evokes.d:
v call forth (emotions, feelings, and responses)
v evoke or provoke to appear or occur
v deduce (a principle) or construe (a meaning)
v summon into action or bring into existence, often as if by magic
v call to mind

evoking.t: v. 产生, 引起, 唤起( evoke的现在分词 )
evoking.d: p. pr. & vb. n. of Evoke

evolute.t:
n. 渐屈线
a. 展开的, 反卷的
evolute.d:
n. A curve from which another curve, called the involute or
   evolvent, is described by the end of a thread gradually wound upon the
   former, or unwound from it. See Involute. It is the locus of the
   centers of all the circles which are osculatory to the given curve or
   evolvent.

evolution.t:
n. 进化, 发展, 进展, (气体)放出, 开方
[医] 进化, 演化, 旋出
evolution.d: n. (biology) the sequence of events involved in the evolutionary development of a species or taxonomic group of organisms
evolution.g: gk cet4 cet6 ky toefl ielts

evolution theory.t: [医] 进化论, 演化学说

evolutional.t: a. 进化的, 进展的

evolutionarily.t: adv. 演化地, 演进地(evolutionary的变形)
evolutionarily.d: r. in an evolutionary way; from an evolutionary point of view

evolutionary.t:
a. 展开的, 进化论的, 进化的, 发展的
[计] 进化的, 改良的, 发展的
evolutionary.d: a. of or relating to or produced by evolution

evolutionary operation.t: [计] 改良操作, 寻优运算

evolutionism.t:
n. 进化论
[医] 进化论
evolutionism.d: n (biology) a scientific theory of the origin of species of plants and animals

evolutionist.d: n. a person who believes in organic evolution

evolutionists.t: (evolutionist 的复数) n. 进化论者
evolutionists.d:
plural of evolutionist
n. a person who believes in organic evolution

evolutions.t:
(evolution 的复数) n. 进化, 发展, 进展, (气体)放出, 开方
[医] 进化, 演化, 旋出
evolutions.d:
plural of evolution
n. (biology) the sequence of events involved in the evolutionary development of a species or taxonomic group of organisms

evolutive.t:
a. (促进)发展的, (促进)进化的
[医] 进化的

evolve.t:
vi. 进展, 进化, 展开
vt. 使发展, 使推断出, 使进化
evolve.d:
v. work out
v. undergo development or evolution

evolved.d:
v work out
v undergo development or evolution
v gain through experience

evolvement.t: n. 展开, 进化, 发展, 进展
evolvement.d:
n. The act of evolving, or the state of being evolved;
   evolution.

evolvent.d: n. The involute of a curve. See Involute, and Evolute.

evolves.t: v. 演变, 进化( evolve的第三人称单数 ); （动植物等 ）进化, 进化形成
evolves.d:
v work out
v undergo development or evolution
v gain through experience

evolving.d:
v work out
v undergo development or evolution
v gain through experience

evoxine.t: 尖叶云香碱, 吴茱萸素

evp.t: [医][=episcleral venous pressure]浅层巩膜静脉压

evra.t: [医][=renal vein renin activity]肾静脉肾素活性

evry.t: n. 埃夫里市（法国城市）

evs.t: (ev 的复数) [电] 电子伏特
evs.d:
plural of ev
n a unit of energy equal to the work done by an electron accelerated through a potential difference of 1 volt

evt.t: abbr. 等粘温度（equiviscous temperature）；极端值理论（Extreme Value Theory）

evu.t: abbr. evaporation unit 蒸发设备

evulsion.t:
n. 拔出, 拔去
[医] 撕去, 撕脱
evulsion.d: n. The act of plucking out; a rooting out.

evvoia.t: 埃维亚(爱琴海中的希腊东海岸大岛)

evy.t: abbr. 每一个（every）；特使文档（Envoy document）

evzone.t: n. 希腊精锐部队的步兵(士兵)
